title: Personalized Acrylic Letter Snowman Christmas Ornaments - 26 Alphabet Tree Decorations, Prepare for Family Friends Teacher (1, L)
features: Personalized Design & Complete Alphabet Set: Create meaningful keepsakes with 26 acrylic letters from A-Z, allowing custom spelling of names (like ‘Mom’ or ‘Grandma’), special dates, or blessing words. Each 3.2-inch snowman ornament comes with pre-drilled holes for effortless hanging on Christmas trees, wreaths, or fireplace(Attention: This product is a 2D acrylic plane,The side with protective film is the front, please remove before use.Please contact us by email if you have any questions. Thank you!)

Premium Material: These Christmas tree letter decorations are made of high-quality acrylic material, which is sturdy, durable, and not easily broken or deformed. adopts UV printing patterns to ensure long-lasting and durable colors, maintaining their original appearance for a long time

Unique Letter Decoration Design: Each of the 26 letters is accompanied by a cute snowman with red decorations and a Christmas hat, adding a festive atmosphere to your Christmas tree ornaments and making your holiday decorations more unique and expressive
Multi-Use: Ideal for Christmas trees, car, or home decor, it brings charm to holidays, birthdays, graduations, and more, making every occasion uniquely memorable

Interesting 26 Letter Christmas Tree Ornaments: Christmas 26 letter ornaments are perfect for courtyards, homes, offices, schools, rooms, Christmas trees, porches, doors, walls, terraces, Christmas wreaths, windows, stairs, Christmas stockings, dining tables, and other places. It can also be used as a party gift. Ensure that your Christmas tree decoration stands out among all other decorations
description: Product Description Personalized Acrylic Letter Snowman Christmas Ornaments Each decoration features a classic snowman paired with letters to convey a festive atmosphere. Hanging on the treetops, spelling out names (such as "FAMILY" and "JOY") or initials (such as a child's name "Lily-L") to create exclusive family memories. Christmas Snowman Alphabet Decorations It will be the best decoration and gift for many holidays such as Christmas, New Year, birthdays, etc. Decorate gift packaging, window sills, or string them into name tags to unlock holiday DIY fun.
